idx_clients_referred_by.name: idx_clients_referred_by
idx_clients_referred_by.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND referred_by IS NOT NULL)

idx_email_drafts_scheduled.name: idx_email_drafts_scheduled
idx_email_drafts_scheduled.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'READY' AND scheduled_at IS NOT NULL)

idx_github_repo_links_oauth.name: idx_github_repo_links_oauth
idx_github_repo_links_oauth.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND oauth_connection_id IS NOT NULL)

idx_github_repo_links_installation.name: idx_github_repo_links_installation
idx_github_repo_links_installation.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND github_app_installation_id IS NOT NULL)

github_repo_links_auth_source_check.name: github_repo_links_auth_source_check
github_repo_links_auth_source_check.value:
(
        (oauth_connection_id IS NOT NULL AND github_app_installation_id IS NULL)
        OR (oauth_connection_id IS NULL AND github_app_installation_id IS NOT NULL)
      )

idx_hour_blocks_invoice_id.name: idx_hour_blocks_invoice_id
idx_hour_blocks_invoice_id.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND invoice_id IS NOT NULL)

idx_hour_blocks_invoice_line_item_unique.name: idx_hour_blocks_invoice_line_item_unique
idx_hour_blocks_invoice_line_item_unique.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND invoice_line_item_id IS NOT NULL)

idx_invoice_line_items_product_catalog.name: idx_invoice_line_items_product_catalog
idx_invoice_line_items_product_catalog.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND product_catalog_item_id IS NOT NULL)

idx_invoices_share_token.name: idx_invoices_share_token
idx_invoices_share_token.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND share_token IS NOT NULL AND share_enabled = true)

idx_invoices_proposal_id.name: idx_invoices_proposal_id
idx_invoices_proposal_id.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND proposal_id IS NOT NULL)

idx_leads_contact_email_unique.name: idx_leads_contact_email_unique
idx_leads_contact_email_unique.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND contact_email IS NOT NULL)

idx_meetings_lead.name: idx_meetings_lead
idx_meetings_lead.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND lead_id IS NOT NULL)

idx_meetings_client.name: idx_meetings_client
idx_meetings_client.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND client_id IS NOT NULL)

idx_meetings_conference.name: idx_meetings_conference
idx_meetings_conference.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND conference_id IS NOT NULL)

idx_messages_unanalyzed.name: idx_messages_unanalyzed
idx_messages_unanalyzed.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND analyzed_at IS NULL)

plan_threads_session_xor_scope.name: plan_threads_session_xor_scope
plan_threads_session_xor_scope.value: (session_id IS NOT NULL AND scope_session_id IS NULL) OR (session_id IS NULL AND scope_session_id IS NOT NULL)

idx_projects_owner.name: idx_projects_owner
idx_projects_owner.where: (deleted_at IS NULL AND owner_id IS NOT NULL)

projects_type_client_check.name: projects_type_client_check
projects_type_client_check.value:
(
        (type = 'CLIENT' AND client_id IS NOT NULL)
        OR (
          type IN ('PERSONAL', 'INTERNAL')
          AND client_id IS NULL
        )
      )

public.current_user_with_role.definition: SELECT id, role FROM users u WHERE id = auth.uid() AND deleted_at IS NULL
public.current_user_with_role.name: current_user_with_role
